productDisplayName: Spykar Men Rts Style Live Ride Navy Blue Sweaters
description: Composition Navy blue v-neck sleeveless vest made of 86% cotton and 14% nylon, with ribbed neckline, armholes and hemline, red tape detailing on the inseam of the collar and embroidered brand name on the left chest Fitting Comfort Wash care Mild handwash in cold water with mild detergent Do not soak Flat dry Avoid twisting or wringing To maintain shape fold and stack Dry in shade Moderate warm iron A perfect way to welcome chilly weather, this navy blue vest from spykar is designed for those who love style and comfort. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish vest which can be layered with shirts and tees, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with denims or corduroys and black footwear to look like the king of casual wear. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-5.11", Shoulders-18.5"
